name: host-shell-safety
description: Rules for Varden Monitor shell.execute: destructive shell patterns, infrastructure CLIs (Railway/Heroku-style), and broad kubectl delete usage.

block.title: Block recursive delete via host monitor
block.name: host_block_rm_rf
block.description: Blocks rm -rf style invocations launched through Varden Monitor.

block.title: Block Terraform destroy via host
block.name: host_block_terraform_destroy
block.description: Blocks terraform destroy from monitored shells.

block.title: Block kubectl delete with all-namespaces
block.name: host_block_kubectl_delete_all_namespaces
block.description: Blocks kubectl delete when --all-namespaces appears in argv.

warn.title: Warn on Railway CLI via monitor
warn.name: host_warn_railway_cli
warn.description: Warns when Railway CLI is invoked under monitor (review tokens and targets).

warn.title: Warn on curl from monitored shell
warn.name: host_warn_curl
warn.description: Warns on outbound curl from monitored shells.
